name: Emergency Room
overview: Emergency Room is a heartfelt tribute to the unsung heroes of our healthcare system who work tirelessly behind the scenes. Their struggles and sacrifices often go unnoticed, but this time, their story takes centre stage. Starring Alisha Parveen, this gripping series delves into the life of a medical professional who battles against time, personal dilemmas, and navigates the chaotic world of healthcare. Witness the journey of one such hero—because not all superheroes wear capes.

trailers.title: Emergency Room | New Hindi Web Series | Official Trailer | Streaming From 04 Apr | Alisha Parveen ​
